name: 坐标平面
subject: math
domain_name: 几何与测量 / Geometry & Measurement / Geometry & Measurement
curriculum_points: 5.G.1 Use a pair of perpendicular number lines, called axes, to define a coordinate system, with the intersection of the lines (the origin) arranged to coincide with the 0 on each line and a given point in the plane located by using an ordered pair of numbers, called its coordinates. Understand that the first number indicates how far to travel from the origin in the direction of one axis, and the second number indicates how far to travel in the direction of the second axis, with the convention that the names of the two axes and the coordinates correspond (e.g., x-axis and x-coordinate, y-axis and y-coordinate).
5.G.2 Represent real world and mathematical problems by graphing points in the first quadrant of the coordinate plane, and interpret coordinate values of points in the context of the situation.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「坐标平面」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：5.G.1 Use a pair of perpendicular number lines, called axes, to define a coordinate system, with the intersection of the…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：5.G.2 Represent real world and mathematical problems by graphing points in the f… 对理解「坐标平面」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
